prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-VASELINE-LIPTHER-COCOABUTTER-3PK-HPN Product Type: LIP_BALM Brand (from catalog): Vaseline Existing Title: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter (3 Pack) Description: Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter is enriched with caring Cocoa and Shea Butter to provide your lips with the essential moisturization but also give your lips a moisturizing smoothness while keeping them looking healthy. This lip balm helps to provide you with a fast-acting nourishment from Chapped, Dry, Cracked, or Damaged Lips. This Lip Balm by Vaseline was formulated in an easy use stick form with Cocoa and Shea Butter to help provide ultimate hydration and a touch of Petroleum Jelly to help lock in the moisture. Vaseline Lip Therapy helps to keep your lips hydrated no matter what the day throws at you. Whether in your pocket, your desk, or car this Vaseline Lip Balm needs to be easily accessible to help deliver a surge of moisture to your damaged lips.

- Chapped Lips

- Cracked Lips

- Damaged Lips

- Extremely Dry Lips

This handy pocket-sized lip balm is non-sticky and non-greasy formula to help spread on easily and sooth your damaged lips. Our lips have an amazing ability to experience heightened sensations which allows us to feel the slightest touch and senses. However, unlike your skin, the skin on your lips does not naturally create its own moisture layer leaving them susceptible to dryness and cracking. Vaseline’s stylish Lip Therapy balm comes in an original retro look that is perfect to help keep your lips from being chapped, dry, or cracked.

- Petroleum Jelly

- Cocoa & Shea Butter

- Lip Treatment Search Terms: chap stick tubes for kids lip balm vaseline tube chapstick women men Features: - Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter is enriched with caring Cocoa and Shea Butter for essential daily moisturization your lips need to remain healthy. - This Lip Balm by Vaseline helps provide a fast-acting nourishment to any Chapped, Dry, Cracked, or Damaged Lips leaving them soft and pampered. - Vaseline’s Lip Therapy was formulated with Cocoa & Shea Butter to help provide ultimate hydration and with a touch of Aloe Vera to help lock in the moisture. - This handy pocket-sized lip balm is non-sticky and non-greasy formula to help spread on easily and deliver a surge of moisture to your damaged lips. - Whether in your pocket, your desk, or car this Vaseline Lip Balm needs to be easily accessible to help protect and sooth your lips. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Cocoa And Shea Butter, Moisturizing Stick, Chapped And Dry Lips Relief, Non-Greasy Formula, Pocket-Sized

openai.title_differentiation: Cocoa And Shea Butter, Fast-Acting Moisturization, Non-Sticky Non-Greasy, Pocket-Sized Stick, Helps Soothe Dry Chapped Lips
